series_metadata.series_title: Export Schedule of Fuel Shipped to Ohio
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly reports of fuel received from other states indicating fuel was shipped to Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years then destroy. A majority of the Export records that are received electronically. This rule is for those records that may be received via mail or fax. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
